text.title: Alert Triage Decision Tree Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of alert-triage-decision-tree. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Alert labelled `P1` 18 months ago now fires on 200/day; pager numbness sets in.
antipattern.fix: Derive severity from current signal (error rate, saturation) every fire.

antipattern.symptom: Page sent to 'on-call' string; nobody knows which rotation.
antipattern.fix: Owner MUST be a named team handle resolvable in service catalog.

antipattern.symptom: Suppression rule eats a P0 because dedupe window swallowed both fires.
antipattern.fix: Every suppression writes an audit entry; weekly review of suppress log.
